title: Will Viktor Orban’s Legacy Live On in Brussels, Even Without Him?
summary_full: Viktor Orban, Hungary’s newly ousted prime minister, helped to finance a Brussels think tank that pushes his populist vision. It will outlast him, at least for a while.
summary_public: Viktor Orban, Hungary’s newly ousted prime minister, helped to finance a Brussels think tank that pushes his populist vision. It will outlast him, at least for a while.

BE.label: negative
BE.evidence: Brussels think tank that pushes his populist vision

HU.label: mixed
HU.evidence: Viktor Orban, Hungary’s newly ousted prime minister, helped to finance a Brussels think tank that pushes his populist vision
